pillars.label: Workflow
pillars.summary: Trader process — relate to market, thesis, express, return, review. Disagreement is one relationship mode today; more planned.

pillars.label: Edge
pillars.summary: Find and test executable dislocations and structure fit — simulation only, not order routing.

pillars.label: Legibility
pillars.summary: Honest readable market structure — implied distributions, projection, trust labels.

integration_tiers.charter_question: Why collect? What subset? How often?
Does it close the trader loop?

milestone_note: Trader Workflow Integration v1 — process fit over platform breadth. Relay queue: crypto multi-asset, self-serve onboarding, universe tiers. Module registry maps what exists vs what slice runs next (FRONTIER still controls relay order).

active_milestone.label: Trader Workflow Integration v1
active_milestone.north_star: See what options imply, where you disagree, and what payoff fits — then come back as part of your process.
active_milestone.outcome: Traders use MSOS during their trading process (not just a demo tour); strong+ validation signals ship as product.
active_milestone.your_focus_today: Learning loop — log trader sessions, watch for return-without-prompt. Relay: forward consistency radar when prioritized. VM: cross-venue collector already scheduled.
active_milestone.complete_when: ≥3 traders use MSOS during process; ≥2 return within 7 days without a scheduled follow-up; BTC+ETH live; P4→P7 loop green.

areas.can_do_now: Open Strategy Lab — BTC/ETH + enabled assets; view implied distribution, overlay belief, read disagreement.
areas.why_important: Core legibility — answers what options price at an expiry. Disagreement is today's main market-relationship mode.
areas.your_work: Use it in real pre-trade research; log strong+ signals in validation. No BUILD unless steward queues relationship-mode expansion.
areas.next_step: Multi-asset parity in daily use; additional relationship modes (T4 charter).

areas.can_do_now: Chart-first price × time view; implied forward overlay; region thesis (polish + workflow chapters in flight).
areas.why_important: Projection legibility — where structure points in time × price, not the distribution histogram.
areas.your_work: Walk the route when testing wedge depth; note UX gaps for validation log. Surface archive collector on VM when chapter ships.
areas.next_step: Region workflow persistence; daily surface archive for replay.

areas.can_do_now: Per asset/expiry check in Strategy Lab panel — synthetic forward vs future after spreads (research only).
areas.why_important: Trust + edge testing — is data honest, and is there a testable dislocation? Not an arb detector.
areas.your_work: Prioritize IDE BUILD for ppe_forward_consistency_radar_v1 when operator says IDE_BUILD — dashboard heatmap first.
areas.next_step: Relay slice 1: quality flags + dashboard.json → slice 2: MSOS heatmap page.

areas.can_do_now: After thesis confirm — suggested structure under constraints; paper trade save; simulation only.
areas.why_important: Closes the loop from disagreement to expression — optimal exposure fit without execution.
areas.your_work: Run full P4→P7 path in user tests; capture where expression step breaks process fit.
areas.next_step: Deeper exposure optimization; optional history if replay needed.

areas.can_do_now: Daily PM vs Deribit BTC gap snapshot + ranked report on VM; backtest when ≥14d history.
areas.why_important: Research edge lane — event market vs options-implied; feeds learning, not trader nav.
areas.your_work: Ensure VM task installed after pull; skim latest.md weekly. No trader-facing BUILD unless validation pulls it.
areas.next_step: Backtest digest when snapshot history deep enough.

areas.can_do_now: Full thesis → confirm → expression → monitor/history loop with asset propagation.
areas.why_important: This is the product — modules feed the workflow; workflow is how traders return.
areas.your_work: Primary validation target: do traders return without you? Log sessions per TRADER_WORKFLOW_RESEARCH_V1.
areas.next_step: Self-serve onboarding polish; return-without-prompt evidence for milestone.

areas.can_do_now: ~25-asset catalog, enablement pipeline, trust surface, prod multi-asset witness.
areas.why_important: Scale without one-off fixes — every new asset is registry row + witness, not a new MSOS build.
areas.your_work: Enable batches via enable_asset_batch.py; green witness after deploy. Display cache ops when queued.
areas.next_step: Display cache warm schedule; forward consistency radar as meta-adjacent trust tool.

modules.card_summary: Primary legibility module in Strategy Lab. Disagreement overlay is the main market-relationship mode.
Price × time projection; surface archive chartered for replay.
Strategy Lab panel live; dashboard and heatmap not built. Target T3 with daily status snapshots only.
Structure fit under constraints — simulation only.
Polymarket vs options gap — research lane. VM daily task shipped.

workflow_surface.card_summary: MSOS lifecycle surfaces — not a PPE analytical module.

meta_infra_card.advance: Display cache ops; forward consistency radar relay
meta_infra_card.card_summary: Cross-cutting infra supporting all modules at scale.
